        For more information, visit the GitHub Artifacts FAQ: https://github.com/actions/toolkit/blob/main/packages/artifact/docs/faq.md
2026-03-31T19:46:53.9328195Z ##[group]Run if [ -d "/tmp/gh-aw/cache-memory" ] && [ "$(ls -A /tmp/gh-aw/cache-memory 2>/dev/null)" ]; then

2026-03-31T19:46:53.9330701Z [36;1mfi[0m
